summary_line: San Diego fee-only fiduciary RIA with strong national content presence — $11.05B AUM, 204 employees, 76 advisors, 0 DRPs. Retirement-focused with content engine: 'Your Money Your Wealth' podcast/show, free retirement classes, /why-pure/fees/ page published. Strong sitemap (300 entries) + nav (94) + known-paths (4 matches). 5 captured pages including pricing. 'Tax-optimized investment management' is a stated specialty.

notable_events.event: ADV snapshot via IAPD CRD 144316 — 204 employees, 76 advisors, $11,054,059,366 regulatory AUM, 0 DRPs. Legal name: 'PURE FINANCIAL ADVISORS, LLC.'

Site capture: 5 pages (home, about, blog, contact, pricing at /why-pure/fees/). Hero: 'Experience the Pure Difference.' Six homepage tiles: Prepare for Retirement · Reduce Your Tax Liability · Find Your Advisor · Invest for Your Future · Never Stop Learning + 'Jumpstart Your Retirement Planning with Our Free Resources!' Two main CTAs: 'Attend a Retirement Class' (free education funnel) + 'Talk to an Advisor.' Pricing page exists at /why-pure/fees/. Tagline: 'Pure Financial Advisors is a fee-only financial planning firm providing retirement planning services and tax-optimized investment management.' Known publicly for 'Your Money Your Wealth' podcast/show — major content brand.
